Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id)

gt_sql: SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN T1.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid WHERE T2.format = 'commander' AND T2.status = 'Legal'

Rows: CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(c.id)

pred_sql:
SELECT CAST(SUM(CASE WHEN c.hasContentWarning = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS REAL) * 100 / COUNT(c.id) 
FROM cards c
JOIN legalities l ON c.uuid = l.uuid
WHERE l.format = 'commander' AND l.status = 'Legal';
question: What percentage of cards with format commander and legal status do not have a content warning?
